+// Inline Gov/Hospital callout shown in boarding scan list and anomaly review.
+// Kept null-safe so callers can pass any pax record without guarding the type.
+function GovHospitalGangwayNote({ pax }) {
+  if (!pax || pax.passengerType !== 'Gov/Hospital') return null;
+  return (
+    <div className="mt-1 p-1.5 rounded text-[10px]" style={{ background: '#FAF5FF', color: '#5B21B6' }}>
+      <div className="font-bold">Gov/Hospital · sanity-check at gangway</div>
+      {pax.agency && <div>Agency: {pax.agency}</div>}
+      {pax.reasonForTravel && <div>Reason: {pax.reasonForTravel}</div>}
+    </div>
+  );
+}

```text
13480	// AdminGovHospitalApprovalsScreen — approval queue for walk-in Gov/Hospital
13481	// bookings. See spec:
13482	// docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-reserved-seat-pools-design.md
13483	// Operations Manager and Super Admin can approve/reject.
13484	// ============================================================================
13485	function AdminGovHospitalApprovalsScreen({ setScreen, t = T.en, govHospitalBookings = [], setGovHospitalBookings = () => {}, sailings = [], setSailings = () => {} }) {
13486	  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('pending');
13487	  const [dateFilter, setDateFilter] = useState('all');
13488	  const [vesselFilter, setVesselFilter] = useState('all');
13489	  const [rejecting, setRejecting] = useState(null); // booking ref being rejected
13490	  const [rejectReason, setRejectReason] = useState('');
13491	
13492	  // Mockup "today" anchor — submittedAt is stored as "May 30 · HH:MM"; we scope
13493	  // approved/rejected KPI tiles to bookings submitted today.
13494	  const TODAY_PREFIX = 'May 30';
13495	  const submittedToday = (b) => typeof b.submittedAt === 'string' && b.submittedAt.startsWith(TODAY_PREFIX);
13496	
13497	  const pendingCount = govHospitalBookings.filter((b) => b.approvalStatus === 'pending').length;
13498	  const approvedToday = govHospitalBookings.filter((b) => b.approvalStatus === 'approved' && submittedToday(b)).length;
13499	  const rejectedToday = govHospitalBookings.filter((b) => b.approvalStatus === 'rejected' && submittedToday(b)).length;
13500	
13501	  // Pool utilization aggregates across upcoming (non-departed) sailings. Capacity
13502	  // and used (taken + pending) are derived from live sailings.pools state so the
13503	  // tile updates as approvals and walk-in submits land.
13504	  const { utilizationUsed, utilizationCapacity } = sailings.reduce((acc, s) => {
13505	    if (s.departed) return acc;
13506	    for (const cls of ['openair', 'aircon', 'vip']) {
13507	      const gov = s.pools?.[cls]?.govHospital;
13508	      if (!gov) continue;
13509	      acc.utilizationCapacity += gov.capacity || 0;
13510	      acc.utilizationUsed     += (gov.taken || 0) + (gov.pending || 0);
13511	    }
13512	    return acc;
13513	  }, { utilizationUsed: 0, utilizationCapacity: 0 });
13514	  const poolUtilization = `${utilizationUsed}/${utilizationCapacity} seats`;
13515	
13516	  const filtered = govHospitalBookings.filter((b) => {
13517	    if (statusFilter !== 'all' && b.approvalStatus !== statusFilter) return false;
13518	    if (vesselFilter !== 'all' && b.vessel !== vesselFilter) return false;
13519	    return true;
13520	  });
13521	
13522	  // Map a booking record's class label to the sailing.pools key.
13523	  const poolKeyForClass = (label) =>
13524	    label === 'Open Air' ? 'openair' : label === 'Aircon' ? 'aircon' : label === 'VIP' ? 'vip' : null;
13525	
13526	  // Voyage-departure guard: once a sailing has departed the booking's outcome is
13527	  // frozen — approve/reject buttons hide and the row shows a "Voyage departed" lock.
13528	  const sailingById = (id) => sailings.find((s) => s.id === id);
13529	  const isVoyageDeparted = (booking) => Boolean(sailingById(booking?.sailingId)?.departed);
13530	
13531	  // Mutate the matching sailing's gov/hospital pool: approve commits a pending
13532	  // slot (pending--, taken++); reject just releases the slot (pending--).
13533	  // Skips bookings already in a terminal state to keep the action idempotent.
13534	  const mutateGovPool = (booking, action) => {
13535	    const classKey = poolKeyForClass(booking.class);
13536	    if (!classKey) return;
13537	    setSailings((prev) => prev.map((s) => {
13538	      if (s.id !== booking.sailingId) return s;
13539	      const cls = s.pools?.[classKey];
13540	      if (!cls) return s;
13541	      const gov = { ...cls.govHospital };
13542	      const currentPending = gov.pending || 0;
13543	      if (currentPending <= 0) return s; // nothing to release/commit
13544	      gov.pending = currentPending - 1;
13545	      if (action === 'approve') gov.taken = (gov.taken || 0) + 1;
13546	      return { ...s, pools: { ...s.pools, [classKey]: { ...cls, govHospital: gov } } };
13547	    }));
13548	  };
13549	
13550	  const approve = (ref) => {
13551	    const target = govHospitalBookings.find((b) => b.ref === ref);
13552	    if (!target || target.approvalStatus !== 'pending') return;
13553	    if (isVoyageDeparted(target)) return;
13554	    mutateGovPool(target, 'approve');
13555	    setGovHospitalBookings((prev) => prev.map((b) =>
13556	      b.ref === ref ? { ...b, approvalStatus: 'approved', approvedBy: 'Reynaldo Salonga' } : b
13557	    ));
13558	  };
13559	  const openReject = (ref) => {
13560	    const target = govHospitalBookings.find((b) => b.ref === ref);
13561	    if (!target || isVoyageDeparted(target)) return;
13562	    setRejecting(ref); setRejectReason('');
13563	  };
13564	  const confirmReject = () => {
13565	    const target = govHospitalBookings.find((b) => b.ref === rejecting);
13566	    if (target && target.approvalStatus === 'pending' && !isVoyageDeparted(target)) {
13567	      mutateGovPool(target, 'reject');
13568	    }
13569	    const reason = rejectReason.trim() || 'No reason provided';
13570	    setGovHospitalBookings((prev) => prev.map((b) =>
13571	      b.ref === rejecting ? { ...b, approvalStatus: 'rejected', rejectionReason: reason } : b
13572	    ));
13573	    setRejecting(null);
13574	    setRejectReason('');
13575	  };
13576	
13577	  return (
13578	    <div>
13579	      <MobileBadge strategy="Mobile Ready" />
13580	
13581	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6 flex-wrap gap-3">
13582	        <div>
13583	          <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-1" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
13584	            Admin · Approvals
13585	          </div>
13586	          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>Gov/Hospital Approvals</h1>
13587	          <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
13588	            Per-booking approval for government officials and hospital workers · walk-in only
13589	          </p>
13590	        </div>
13591	      </div>
13592	
13593	      {/* KPI tiles */}
13594	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-4">
13595	        {[
13596	          { label: 'Pending', value: pendingCount, color: '#92400E', bg: '#FEF3C7' },
13597	          { label: 'Approved today', value: approvedToday, color: '#166534', bg: '#DCFCE7' },
13598	          { label: 'Rejected today', value: rejectedToday, color: '#B91C1C', bg: '#FEE2E2' },
13599	          { label: 'Pool utilization (upcoming)', value: poolUtilization, color: '#5B21B6', bg: '#E9D5FF' },
13600	        ].map((k, i) => (
13601	          <div key={i} className="rounded-2xl p-4 border" style={{ background: k.bg, borderColor: COLORS.border }}>
13602	            <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1" style={{ color: k.color }}>{k.label}</div>
13603	            <div className="text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: k.color }}>{k.value}</div>
13604	          </div>
13605	        ))}
13606	      </div>
13607	
13608	      {/* Filters */}
13609	      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 mb-4 border flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-end" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border }}>
13610	        <div>
13611	          <label className="block text-xs font-semibold mb-1" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>Status</label>
13612	          <select value={statusFilter} onChange={(e) => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)}
13613	            className="h-9 px-3 rounded-lg border text-sm bg-white" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>
13614	            <option value="all">All</option>
13615	            <option value="pending">Pending</option>
13616	            <option value="approved">Approved</option>
13617	            <option value="rejected">Rejected</option>
13618	          </select>
13619	        </div>
13620	        <div>
13621	          <label className="block text-xs font-semibold mb-1" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>Date</label>
13622	          <select value={dateFilter} onChange={(e) => setDateFilter(e.target.value)}
13623	            className="h-9 px-3 rounded-lg border text-sm bg-white" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>
13624	            <option value="all">All dates</option>
13625	            <option value="today">Today</option>
13626	            <option value="7d">Last 7 days</option>
13627	          </select>
13628	        </div>
13629	        <div>
13630	          <label className="block text-xs font-semibold mb-1" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>Vessel</label>
13631	          <select value={vesselFilter} onChange={(e) => setVesselFilter(e.target.value)}
13632	            className="h-9 px-3 rounded-lg border text-sm bg-white" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border, color: COLORS.ink }}>

13635	          </select>

13637	      </div>
13638	
13639	      {/* Table */}
13640	      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border overflow-hidden" style={{ borderColor: COLORS.border }}>
13641	        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
13642	          <table className="w-full text-sm">
13643	            <thead style={{ background: COLORS.bgMuted }}>

13659	                  : { bg: '#FEF3C7', fg: '#92400E', label: 'Pending' };

13661	                  <tr key={b.ref} style={{ borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
13662	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>{b.ref}</td>
13663	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>
13664	                      <div className="font-semibold">{b.voyageDate}</div>
13665	                      <div style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.voyageTime} · {b.vessel}</div>
13666	                      <div style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.route} · {b.class} · {b.seat}</div>
13667	                    </td>
13668	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-semibold" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>{b.passenger.name}</td>
13669	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>
13670	                      <div className="font-semibold">{b.agency}</div>
13671	                      <div style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.designation}</div>
13672	                    </td>
13673	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.ink }}>
13674	                      <div>{b.idType}</div>
13675	                      <div className="font-mono" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.idNumber}</div>
13676	                    </td>
13677	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.ink, maxWidth: 220 }}>{b.reasonForTravel}</td>
13678	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.officer}</td>
13679	                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>{b.submittedAt}</td>
13680	                    <td className="px-3 py-2">
13681	                      <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-bold" style={{ background: chip.bg, color: chip.fg }}>{chip.label}</span>
13682	                    </td>
13683	                    <td className="px-3 py-2">
13684	                      {b.approvalStatus === 'pending' ? (
13685	                        isVoyageDeparted(b) ? (
13686	                          <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded inline-flex items-center gap-1"
13687	                            style={{ background: COLORS.bgMuted, color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>
13688	                            <Lock size={10} /> Voyage departed
13689	                          </span>
13690	                        ) : (
13691	                          <div className="flex gap-1">
13692	                            <button onClick={() => approve(b.ref)} className="text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded" style={{ background: COLORS.success, color: 'white' }}>Approve</button>
13693	                            <button onClick={() => openReject(b.ref)} className="text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded" style={{ background: COLORS.destructive, color: 'white' }}>Reject</button>
13694	                          </div>
13695	                        )
13696	                      ) : (
13697	                        <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: COLORS.inkMuted }}>—</span>
13698	                      )}
13699	                    </td>
13700	                  </tr>
13701	                );
13702	              })}
13703	            </tbody>
13704	          </table>
13705	        </div>
13706	      </div>
13707	
13708	      {/* Reject modal */}
13709	      {rejecting && (
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-30 07:04:42Z)**_

I've read every changed region in the file. Analysis:

**Context** — `docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx` is a static Vercel mockup (per user memory). It's a single ~13k-line React file with hardcoded seed data, local `useState`, no backend, no fetch/exec/SQL/fs/eval, no router-mounted handlers, no IPC. All "approve/reject/lock" logic mutates in-memory React state for demo purposes.

**Changes reviewed**

1. `GovHospitalGangwayNote` (new): renders `pax.agency` and `pax.reasonForTravel` as JSX text children. React auto-escapes — no XSS sink. Null-safe early return is correct.

2. `AdminGovHospitalApprovalsScreen` KPI scoping: `TODAY_PREFIX = 'May 30'` + `submittedToday()` is mockup-only string-prefix filtering on seeded data; no user input reaches it.

3. Pool utilization aggregator: pure read over `sailings` state with optional-chaining and `|| 0` fallbacks; no underflow/overflow risk on the small mockup numbers.

4. `isVoyageDeparted` guard added to `approve`, `openReject`, and `confirmReject`, plus a UI lock chip on the table row. All three mutation paths are gated symmetrically — no sibling-gate-parity gap (the only sibling to `approve`/`openReject` is `confirmReject`, which is also gated). The button hide in the UI is defense-in-depth; the function-level guard is authoritative for the mockup's local state. No authorization sink exists here since there is no server.

5. Function extraction at lines 11829/11961 is a pure refactor of two identical inline blocks; behavior preserved.

No attacker-controlled source reaches any real sink (no shell, SQL, fs, network, DOM `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, eval, deserialization, or auth boundary). This file is presentational mockup code only.

No security findings.
